church_profile.name: 2819 Church
church_profile.nameOrigin: Matthew 28:19 — "Go and make disciples of all the nations"
church_profile.description: An uncompromising church in Atlanta confronting culture with biblical truth, Spirit-led worship, and authentic discipleship

branding.visualTone: Urban, high-contrast, streetwear-influenced. Black backgrounds, bold typography.

leadership.name: Philip Anthony Mitchell
leadership.title: Founder & Lead Pastor
leadership.bio: Philip Anthony Mitchell is the founder and lead pastor of 2819 Church. Born in Queens, New York, he is an honors graduate of North Carolina Central University and holds a degree in Pastoral and Church Leadership from Valor Christian College. His bold, unscripted preaching style has drawn thousands of young adults to faith. Married to Lena since 2004, they have four children.

leadership.name: Tatjuana Phillips
leadership.title: Ministries Director
leadership.bio: Tatjuana Phillips oversees ministry operations at 2819 Church, coordinating Formation Kids, Squads, Serve Teams, and community outreach initiatives.

leadership.name: Arik Hayes
leadership.title: Teaching Pastor
leadership.bio: Arik Hayes serves as a Teaching Pastor and Guest Communicator at 2819 Church, regularly contributing to the Sunday sermon rotation.

leadership.name: Lonnell Williams
leadership.title: Teaching Pastor
leadership.bio: Lonnell Williams holds an M.Div. and serves as a Teaching Pastor at 2819 Church, delivering sermons and leading discipleship initiatives.

ministries.name: Formation Kids
ministries.description: Children's ministry for ages 6 months through 5th grade. Fun, safe discipleship environment with age-appropriate Bible lessons and activities.

ministries.name: Youth Ministry
ministries.description: Youth-focused ministry reaching the next generation with biblical truth and authentic community.

ministries.name: Squads
ministries.description: Small groups with ~1,700 active participants. Discussion, accountability, sermon processing, and friendship-building in intimate settings.

ministries.name: Serve Teams
ministries.description: Volunteer servant leaders who pray over seats before services, usher, greet, and serve the church community each Sunday.

ministries.name: Digital Discipleship
ministries.description: Online engagement arm reaching ~75,000 weekly viewers through livestream, social media, and digital content.

ministries.name: 2819 Institute
ministries.description: Training and education arm for equipping disciples with deep biblical knowledge and leadership skills.

ministries.name: 2819 Ministries
ministries.description: Outreach and missions arm. International mission trips including annual Belize missions and community impact initiatives.

ministries.name: ACCESS
ministries.description: Large-scale prayer events. The 2025 ACCESS gathering at State Farm Arena drew ~40,000 attendees with free admission.

ministries.name: Worship
ministries.description: Contemporary Christian music and worship experience described as "a block party atmosphere" — Spirit-led, high-energy, and transformative.

ministries.name: 2819 Church Podcast
ministries.description: 117+ episodes across Apple Podcasts, Spotify, iHeart, and Amazon Music. 4.9-star rating with 1,912+ reviews.

giving.philosophy: We believe in the joy of generosity. Every gift supports our mission to reach the nations with the gospel of Jesus Christ.

methods.label: 2819 Church App
methods.instructions: Give through the 2819 Church app (iOS & Android)

events.title: ACCESS 2026
events.description: Annual citywide prayer gathering. Last year at State Farm Arena, ~40,000 attendees. Free admission.

events.title: Night of Worship
events.description: An evening of extended worship, prayer, and encounter at 2819 Church.

events.title: Belize Mission Trip
events.description: Annual international mission trip through 2819 Ministries. Serve communities in Belize.

morningPrayer.name: Weekly Prayer
morningPrayer.description: Corporate prayer gathering. A time to seek God together as a church body.
morningPrayer.access: Join in-person or via the 2819 Church app

metadata.notes: Real 2819 Church branding, ministry structure, sermon series, and public data. Giving amounts, member records, and financial data are mock.
